nasb.text: “Now it shall be, if you diligently obey the Lord your God, being careful to do all His commandments which I command you today, the Lord your God will set you high above all the nations of the earth.

esv.text: “And if you faithfully obey the voice of the Lord your God, being careful to do all his commandments that I command you today, the Lord your God will set you high above all the nations of the earth.

cnv.text: “如果你實在聽從耶和華你的　神的話，謹守遵行他的一切誡命，就是我今日吩咐你的，耶和華你的　神必使你超過地上所有的民族。

ccb.text: “你们若全心顺服你们的上帝耶和华，谨遵祂今天借我吩咐你们的一切诫命，祂必使你们超越天下万国。
